activity_name: Register the Name of the patient

llm_result.activity_name: Register the Name of the patient

ground_truth_steps.description: Confirm the spelling of the name with the patient

response_steps.description: Review the entered name for typos and confirm with the patient before saving.

step_mappings.explanation: Both steps describe the action of verifying the accuracy of the patient's name with the patient. The response step adds the detail of reviewing for typos, which is a more specific way of confirming spelling.

ground_truth_steps.description: Enter the name into the registration system

response_steps.description: Type the first name and middle name(s) exactly as shown on the ID into the corresponding fields in the HIS.

step_mappings.explanation: Both steps describe the core action of inputting the patient's name into a system. The response step provides more detail by specifying 'type' instead of 'enter', mentioning the source (ID), and the specific system ('HIS').

unmatched_ground_truth_steps.description: Ask the patient for their first name
unmatched_ground_truth_steps.reason: This step describes obtaining the patient's name verbally. The response steps focus on obtaining the name from an official government-issued ID rather than by asking directly.

unmatched_response_steps.description: Request the patient's official government-issued photo ID (e.g., driver's license or passport).
unmatched_response_steps.reason: This step describes a method of identity verification and name acquisition (requesting an ID) that is not present in the ground truth steps, which imply a verbal interaction.

unmatched_response_steps.description: Locate the patient's legal first name and middle name(s) on the ID.
unmatched_response_steps.reason: This step describes the action of extracting the name from an official ID. The ground truth steps do not include a process for obtaining the name from an ID.
